item.title: Family of U.N. Expert Critical of Israel Sues Trump Over Sanctions
item.description: The family of Francesca Albanese, a critic of Israel’s war in Gaza, asked a court to void the Trump administration’s sanctions against her.

item.title: They Helped Women Fight Online Abuse. They Were Barred From the U.S.
item.description: The founders of HateAid, a German human-rights group that helps victims of online attacks, were accused by the Trump administration of being part of a...

item.title: Marco Rubio Says U.S. Is Probing Deadly Cuban Shooting
item.description: Cuban officials said border troops engaged in gunfire with a Florida-based speedboat on Wednesday, leaving four dead on the boat and six wounded. Secr...

item.title: A Deal or War? Crucial Talks Begin Between U.S. and Iran.
item.description: President Trump has kept up a steady drumbeat of threats and built up U.S. troops in the region. Iran’s task is to give him a win but also preserve so...

item.title: The Latest New Zealander to Move to Australia Is an Ex-Prime Minister
item.description: Jacinda Ardern, New Zealand’s former leader, is basing her family in Australia “for the moment,” a spokesman said. She is part of a wave of Kiwis relo...
